scope_caveats: (s1) C2 composite = C1 alpha+SF TOTAL-survival window score x island_weight Gaussian. (c)-source is NO LONGER alpha-only (C1 closes that flaw); (a)(b)(d)(e) gates still install-gated.
(s2) Proton magic number is MODEL-DEPENDENT (Z=114 vs 120 vs 126 unresolved) — island_weight is a proximity HINT, never 'near island ⇒ discovered/stable'. sigma is a hyperparameter.
(s3) NUCLEAR.md 3.3 NO fabrication: Q_alpha CITED only (AME2020/NUBASE2020). SF systematics scatter +-2-3 dex; SF dominance is a priority-down-weight PREDICTION (@D d2).
(s4) absorbed=false 永久. 'Z=119 후보일 가능성' != '발견됨'. (d) production sigma + (e) recoil detection wet-lab permanent.
citations: Viola & Seaborg 1966 J Inorg Nucl Chem 28:741 (NC1)
C. Xu & Z. Ren PRC 71 014309 (2005) (C1 SF systematics)
arxiv:2105.01035 AME2020 · NUBASE2020 Kondev+ Chin Phys C 45:030001
recommendation: C2 island-weighted accelerator priority shortlist. absorbed=true requires GSI/JINR/RIKEN beam + detection + IUPAC priority — none from sim (NUCLEAR.md 7). '가능성' != '임'.
